/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcontrol__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libcontrol__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/control__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/control/msg/_hardware_command_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alyazahrarr/tubes_dagoz/src/build/control:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libcontrol__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libcontrol__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
